title: Text Now
definition: TextNow is a VoIP (Voice over Internet Protocol) application that provides users with a phone number, mainly for calling and texting over WiFi or mobile data. It allows users to send messages and make voice calls without using a traditional SIM-based phone service.
advantages: Perfect for verification, messaging and general online use.

title: Ooma Software
definition: Ooma is a cloud-based VoIP phone system software designed for businesses. It provides calling, messaging, virtual numbers, and team communication tools for modern companies.

title: Ring Central
